attributes.description: Overview of Sign-on report from Workday in Elastic.

params.markdown:
### Overview

The Workday Sign-On dashboard provides security and IT teams visibility into authentication activity from the Workday Sign-On custom report, covering sign-on volume, authentication methods, and failure patterns.

The Total Users tile shows authenticated account scope, while Sign-ons by Authentication Type and Distribution of Authentication Types break down usage across SAML, OAuth 2.0, Trusted, Username/Password, and ID Token.

Top Source IPs surfaces active originating addresses for investigation, Top SAML Identity Providers highlights federated sign-in sources, and the Failure Breakdown table helps teams quickly triage authentication failures.

[**Integration Page**](/app/integrations/detail/workday/overview)
